summary: Tested Mom's side improvements for True Joy Birthing. All 3 features verified: 1) My Team section new subtitle text is present, 2) Contract to Sign route fix verified (uses /sign-contract without /(mom)/ prefix), 3) Provider leads endpoint returns new fields and Frontend UI has Key Details section. Backend tests pass 100%.
critical_code_review_comments: My Team subtitle text updated in my-team.tsx line 113 - correctly shows 'Complete your birth plan before inviting your care team...'
Contract to Sign route fixed in home.tsx lines 235-237 - uses '/sign-contract' and '/sign-midwife-contract' without the problematic '/(mom)/' prefix
Backend leads.py lines 161-191 now fetches birth_plans collection and extracts: birth_plan_due_date, birth_plan_location, birth_plan_hospital_name, previous_birth_experience, birth_plan_completion

Frontend ProviderLeads.tsx lines 294-347 displays Key Details section with all new fields: Number of Children, Due Date, Birth Location, Hospital/Facility Name, Previous Birth Experience, Birth Plan Completion percentage
API curl test confirmed leads endpoint returns: number_of_children=3, birth_plan_completion=100.0 for demo mom (other fields null as expected when not populated in birth plan)
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data. Lead for demo mom exists with number_of_children=3, birth_plan_completion=100%
context_for_next_testing_agent: React Native Web login button clicks not working in Playwright - same issue as iteration 136. Code review verification approach used. All features verified correct via code review and backend API tests. The mom's birth plan 'about_me' section fields (dueDate, birthLocation, hospitalName) return null because demo mom hasn't filled those specific fields in birth plan yet.

feature_1_my_team_text.text: Complete your birth plan before inviting your care team. Doulas and midwives will first see key details to consider working together, then your full plan after you approve them.
